text:
spring, one of the Earth's four temperate seasons, occurring between winter and summer; one of the 8 Sámi seasons, also known as spring season, springtime season, springtime. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "Spring"
- follows: "winter"
- followed by: "summer"
- opposite of: "autumn"
- subclass of: "season"
- Commons gallery: "Spring"
- described by source: "Gujin Tushu Jicheng",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Explanatory Dictionary of the Living Great Russian Language"
- month of the year: "September (valid in place: Southern Hemisphere)",
 "October (valid in place: Southern Hemisphere)",
 "November (valid in place: Southern Hemisphere)",
 "March (valid in place: Northern Hemisphere)",
 "April (valid in place: Northern Hemisphere)",
 "May (valid in place: Northern Hemisphere)"
- event interval: "+1 http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1092296"
